# fill(_:offset:)

**Instance Method**

Writes the specified data into the buffer.

## Declaration

```swift
func fill(_ data: Data, offset: Int)
```

## Parameters

- **data**: The data to be copied into the buffer.
- **offset**: The offset, in bytes, from the start of the buffer at which to write data.

## Discussion

If the length of the specified data (plus the `offset` parameter, if nonzero) is greater than the buffer’s [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMeshBuffer/length] property, this method writes data only up to the end of the buffer.

## Working with Data in a Buffer

- **map()**: Provides direct, read-only access to the buffer’s contents.
- **length**: The data size of the buffer, in bytes.
